content.en:
"Let's attack together!"

The Dragon God will roar.

The other four gods of the Cangyu universe, plus the Yuangu gods and the stone dragon gods, have made a move.

Thundered!!!

Rounds of attacks bombarded the lazy beast, but they were never able to hurt the lazy beast, but it gave the lazy beast signs of awakening.

"Ten Thousand Law Divine General, why don't you make a move?"

The Ancient God asked.

"Don't waste your efforts, with your strength, you can't hurt this lazy beast!" Ye Tian said in a deep voice.

"Lazy beasts?"

The Yuan Gu God General stopped, looked at Ye Tian, and waited for Ye Tian's answer.

And the other gods also stopped one by one, and they also understood that they and others could not kill the lazy beast.

Ye Tian said directly: "This giant beast is called an inert beast, and it has been sleeping almost all since it was born, and if the dimensional world collapses this time, it may still be asleep." Therefore, it does not threaten us, and there is no need to kill it. If you really want to kill it, you can't do it without the strength of a top three-star god general. "

"I see!"

The ancient gods will suddenly realize.

The other god generals also gave up completely, they only had the strength of a star god general, so naturally they couldn't kill the lazy beast.

At this moment, several rays of light shuttled in, instantly tearing through the world barrier of the world on the back of the lazy beast and entering that world.

"It's those gods of the Tibetan God Organization!"

The stone dragon god said angrily.

He had a great grudge against the Tibetan God Organization, and if it weren't for the secret treasure he had, he would have died last time in the hands of the Zhang Ling God General of the Tibetan God Organization.

One of the divine generals who rushed into the lazy beast world just now was Zhang Ling Divine General, and he could never forget the breath of Zhang Ling Divine General for the rest of his life.

"Isn't there a great chance in this lazy beast world?"

The Yuan Gu God will ask Ye Tian.

"I don't know!" Ye Tian shook his head and said, "I only know about lazy beasts, but I don't know much about the lazy beast world, why don't we go in too!"

Whew!!

Several gods tore through the world barriers of the Lazy Beast World and rushed into the Lazy Beast World.

The world of lazy beasts is huge, but the rules inside are similar to the outside world, nothing special.

And for the god-level powerhouses, the lazy beast world can't suppress them, after all, it's just a huge world bred by the lazy beast.

"The resources are abundant!"

Ye Tian entered the world of lazy beasts, sensed it slightly, and muttered.

However, he didn't find a more advanced resource, but for the Earth Venerable, this lazy beast world was undoubtedly a place of chance.

"That's ......"

Ye Tian felt a great avenue aura in the center of the inert beast world, radiating the entire world.

The gods who entered the lazy beast world flew to the center of the lazy beast world one by one, and soon all the gods gathered here, but they were all in a state of confrontation.

Especially the Stone Dragon Divine General and the Zhang Ling Divine General, the qi of the two of them was already fighting, otherwise this ancient stone tablet in the lazy beast world, they would probably have already fought.

"Innate Dao Monument, I didn't expect this lazy beast world to really be born!"

A god general of the Tibetan God Organization, his eyes stared at the Innate Dao Monument, shining.

"Innate Dao Monument?"

Many gods will be curious.

There are many similar stone tablets in the universe, and even some small stars have some stone tablets, which can assist people to comprehend the laws and martial arts, but the level is relatively low, and it is of little use to the strong.

"Hmph, a group of natives don't even know the Innate Dao Monument!" Zhang Ling said disdainfully: "The Innate Dao Monument is very rare, and the Lazy Beast World behind the Inert Beast always absorbs the power and rules of the outside world, and in a specific environment, there is a very small chance that the Innate Dao Monument will be born." The Innate Dao Tablet is also a very high-level treasure when placed in Chaos, but the Innate Dao Tablet is fused with the Lazy Beast World, and there is no way to take it away. If the Lazy Beast World is shattered, the Innate Dao Monument will also disappear. I advise you not to do it, or this world of lazy beasts may not be able to withstand our fight. "

Zhang Ling's words are mainly for the stone dragon god general, don't fight for revenge and cause the innate Dao monument to disappear, that is to ruin a big opportunity.

"You haven't said anything about the usefulness of the Innate Dao Monument?"

The ancient gods will say.

Zhang Lingshen said lightly: "The innate Dao tablet can improve comprehension, if you comprehend some great supernatural powers and secret techniques, the speed will be much faster than usual, even for us gods, it is also very useful." But the real use is not so, but to let us condense the innate avenue. Even if I don't say it, once you comprehend the Innate Dao Monument, you will know that your Great Dao is incomplete, because our Great Dao is the Great Dao of the Universe, and it is difficult to make up for the Great Dao, and it is almost impossible to achieve it in the universe, but the Innate Dao Monument can help us make up for the defects and condense the Innate Dao. In essence, the Innate Dao is not very powerful, but its growth is far beyond that of the Cosmic Dao. It is estimated that the Great Dao realm of you gods is in the middle or late stage of the origin and cannot progress for countless years, and that is because of defects. If the Innate Dao is condensed, there may be a glimmer of hope to transcend the Origin Realm! Okay, let's each choose an area and start enlightenment, don't disturb each other, how about it?"

"Good!"

The Ancient God nodded.

The other gods also agreed, and the stone dragon god generals hesitated for a moment, but nodded in agreement.

After all, he didn't have the certainty to deal with Zhang Lingshen, and he didn't want to miss this opportunity.

On the side, Ye Tian thought back to the words of Zhang Lingshen.

Other people's avenues are lacking, but his avenues are perfect, and they are already true innate avenues, and they are not ordinary innate avenues, they are truly perfect innate avenues.

It stands to reason that he doesn't need the Innate Dao Monument to make up for the defects of the Great Dao, but the Innate Dao Monument can make his Dao realm improve a little.

His Great Dao realm has now reached the peak realm of the late stage of the Origin Realm, and he is not far from the perfection of the Origin.

Perhaps, he could break the shackles in one fell swoop with the help of the Innate Dao Monument and achieve the Chaos Dao of the Origin Perfection Realm.

A famous god will arrange a simple small formation to prevent himself from being disturbed, and then he will begin to retreat and comprehend the Innate Dao Monument near the surrounding area of the Innate Dao Monument.

At the same time, the news of the Innate Dao Monument also leaked out, and more and more gods came here.

Usually, the gods and dragons see the beginning and the end, and it is difficult to see one, but now there are too many gods here, and even the gods of the Cangyu universe are almost all here, except for some gods who have been in retreat for a long time and cannot be contacted, other gods and generals are basically here.
